end_cities_cleared.title: Clear 3 End Cities — fully loot all chests including upper tower rooms

totem_collected.title: Collect a Totem of Undying from an End City Evoker

subtitle.text: The End Cities are the last architecture. No civilization built here after the seal was placed.

description: End Cities are the final frontier of conventional loot.
Three full clears will give you enchanted diamond/netherite armor,
stacks of gold and iron, and multiple Totems of Undying.
Totems of Undying trigger on death — one free death per totem.
In Ch15-17, you will want several.
Do not hoard them as trophies. Use them as tools.
- Enchanted armor and weapons (random enchants, high tier)
- The Totem of Undying from Evoker mobs guarding upper floors
After clearing 3 cities, you have extracted everything conventional from the End.
